children.heading: Program authorized
children.label: a Program authorized
children.text: The Secretary shall provide grants and related assistance to Alaska Native-serving institutions and Native Hawaiian-serving institutions to enable such institutions to improve and expand their capacity to serve Alaska Natives and Native Hawaiians.
the term “Alaska Native” has the meaning given the term in ;section 7546 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is an eligible institution under ; andsection 1058(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: at the time of application, has an enrollment of undergraduate students that is at least 20 percent Alaska Native students;
the term “Native Hawaiian” has the meaning given the term in ; andsection 7517 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is an eligible institution under ; andsection 1058(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: at the time of application, has an enrollment of undergraduate students that is at least 10 percent Native Hawaiian students.

children.heading: Types of activities authorized
children.label: 1 Types of activities authorized
children.text: Grants awarded under this section shall be used by Alaska Native-serving institutions and Native Hawaiian-serving institutions to assist such institutions to plan, develop, undertake, and carry out activities to improve and expand such institutions’ capacity to serve Alaska Natives or Native Hawaiians.

children.label: A
children.text: purchase, rental, or lease of scientific or laboratory equipment for educational purposes, including instructional and research purposes;

children.label: B
children.text: renovation and improvement in classroom, library, laboratory, and other instructional facilities;

children.label: C
children.text: support of faculty exchanges, and faculty development and faculty fellowships to assist in attaining advanced degrees in the faculty’s field of instruction;

children.label: D
children.text: curriculum development and academic instruction;

children.label: E
children.text: purchase of library books, periodicals, microfilm, and other educational materials;

children.label: F
children.text: funds and administrative management, and acquisition of equipment for use in strengthening funds management;

children.label: G
children.text: joint use of facilities such as laboratories and libraries;

children.label: H
children.text: academic tutoring and counseling programs and student support services; and

children.label: I
children.text: education or counseling services designed to improve the financial literacy and economic literacy of students or the students’ families.

children.heading: Institutional eligibility
children.label: 1 Institutional eligibility
children.text: Each Alaska Native-serving institution and Native Hawaiian-serving institution desiring to receive assistance under this section shall submit to the Secretary such enrollment data as may be necessary to demonstrate that the institution is an Alaska Native-serving institution or a Native Hawaiian-serving institution as defined in subsection (b), along with such other information and data as the Secretary may by regulation require.

children.label: A
children.text: a 5-year plan for improving the assistance provided by the Alaska Native-serving institution or the Native Hawaiian-serving institution to Alaska Native or Native Hawaiian students; and

children.label: B
children.text: such other information and assurance as the Secretary may require.

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: A Eligibility
children.text: No Alaskan Native-serving institution or Native Hawaiian-serving institution that receives funds under this section shall concurrently receive funds under other provisions of this part or part B.

children.heading: Exemption
children.label: B Exemption
children.text: shall not apply to institutions that are eligible to receive funds under this section.Section 1059(d) of this title

children.heading: Distribution
children.label: C Distribution
children.text: In awarding grants under this section, the Secretary shall, to the extent possible and consistent with the competitive process under which such grants are awarded, ensure maximum and equitable distribution among all eligible institutions.
